summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. No shared canonical is appropriate. Close, merge, fix, and raise-PR paths are not available from this job; security-linked refs are routed exactly, useful open PRs stay open, and maintainer review is requested only where the hydrated artifact shows a real maintainer/technical decision point.
